text: The Committee decided to raise the target range for the federal funds rate by 75 basis points.
label: Very Hawkish

text: Inflation remains well above the Committee's 2 percent objective.
label: Hawkish

text: The Committee decided to maintain the target range for the federal funds rate.
label: Neutral

text: The risks to achieving its employment and inflation goals are roughly in balance.
label: Mildly Dovish

text: Inflation has made further progress toward the Committee's 2 percent objective.
label: Dovish

text: The Committee decided to lower the target range for the federal funds rate by 50 basis points.
label: Very Dovish

text: The labor market remains extremely tight and inflation continues to run well above the longer-run goal.
label: Hawkish

text: The disinflationary process has continued and the labor market is showing signs of softening.
label: Dovish
